role_summary: the accounts officer manages accounting operations, financial records, and statutory  comp liance in a public sector undertaking.
responsibilities: • maintain books of accounts and financial records   • prepare financial statements as per government and psu norms   • ensure compliance with accounting standards and regulations   • manage payments, receipts , and reconciliations   • coordinate with statutory and cag auditors   • support budget preparation and financial reporting
qualifications: • ca qualification   • knowledge of psu accounting and government financial rules   • erp and financial systems proficiency
